description: Add a new Category to a Project. Subcategories can also be provided. A successful response returns the new Category UUID.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Response schema for a Category ID.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Category.

schema.description: Request body schema for adding a Category to a Project.

subcategories.description: List of Subcategories under this Category. If no Subcategories are needed, this can be an empty array.
